docs.title: Jason Docs
docs.text:
Welcome to your new MkDocs + Material site.

This repository is now set up so you can publish documentation and blog-style articles from Markdown files.

docs.title: Quick start
docs.text:
1. Create or edit Markdown files in the docs directory.
  2. Update navigation in mkdocs.yml.
  3. Push to master and GitHub Actions will publish the site.

docs.title: Next step
docs.text: Open the Articles section to see starter posts you can edit right away.

docs.title: Welcome
docs.text:
Published: 2026-06-25

This is your first article.

Use this page to share updates, tutorials, project logs, or notes.

docs.title: Why this setup
docs.text:
• Markdown-first writing workflow
  • Simple navigation and search
  • Reliable GitHub Pages deployment from CI

docs.title: Edit this article
docs.text: Change this file at docs/articles/welcome.md and push to master.

docs.title: Title
docs.text: One sentence on what this post teaches.

docs.title: Outcome
docs.text: Share what worked, what did not, and what you would change.
